title: Imperial Mission

{{Quote|Sentients on many planets think of us as the face of the Empire. They remember, 'Victory Without War', indeed,|[[Ethan Adare]]|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 38">[[Legacy (2006) 38|''Legacy'' (2006) 38]]</ref>}}
The '''Imperial Mission''' was a missionary society established by the [[Fel Empire]] whose missionaries devoted themselves to service so to peacefully spread influence by providing aid to people and [[Planet/Legends|planets]], and to help those generally in poverty. 

The idea for a Imperial Mission was first proposed by then [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Head of State (Imperial Remnant)|Head of State]] [[Jagged Fel]] as a part of the [[Victory Without War]] after a suggestion by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]].

==Overview==
{{Quote|The Mission has always been at the service to the Emperor; a change in Emperor simply means finding new ways to be of service.|[[Konrad Rus]] to [[Darth Krayt]]|<ref name="Legacy (2006) 5">[[Legacy (2006) 5|''Legacy'' (2006) 5]]</ref>}}
[[File:Imperial_Mission_Duty.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The Imperial Mission on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].]]
The Imperial Mission was proposed by [[Jagged Fel]] as a part of the [[Victory Without War]] program, but was actually suggested in a throw-away remark by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. Its goal was to peacefully spread [[Fel Empire|Imperial]] influence by providing aid to people and [[Planet/Legends|planets]] ruined by the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], and to help those generally in poverty.

[[Shado Vao|Shado]] and [[Astraal Vao]] were taken in by the Mission when they were young orphans. Shado eventually left and became a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], while Astraal remained, becoming a missionary herself.

Around [[130 ABY]], it was headed by [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Konrad Rus]], who like the rest of the [[Council of Moffs/Legends|Moff Council]], swore allegiance to the usurper [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Darth Krayt]] after he [[Attack on Emperor Fel|staged a coup]] and deposed [[Roan Fel]] from the throne, killing [[Roan Fel's double|Fel's decoy]] and a group of [[Imperial Knight]]s in the process.

In [[137 ABY]], [[Darth Talon]] [[Duel on Socorro|attacked]] [[Marasiah Fel]], [[Elke Vetter]], and Astraal at the Mission on [[Socorro/Legends|Socorro]], but Marasiah and Astraal escaped. By this time and thanks to the efforts of Moff Rus, the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[Darth Krayt's Galactic Empire|Empire]] kept funding the Mission, allowing it to continue aiding the poor of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

However, after [[Darth Wyyrlok (III)|Darth Wyyrlok]] [[Battle on Had Abbadon|incapacitated]] [[Darth Krayt]], and put into motion the [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord's]] vision to bring the entire population of the galaxy into the fold of the [[One Sith]], he ordered that the Imperial Mission's guidelines would be altered so Imperial Missionaries would spread the [[Code of the Sith/Legends|Sith Code]] as well as Sith values to the masses of the galaxy.

After the [[Battle of Coruscant (Second Imperial Civil War)|Battle of Coruscant]], which saw the defeat of Darth Krayt's forces, Empress [[Marasiah Fel]] disbanded the Imperial Mission due to its unpopularity following the war and the Sith's abuse of it.
